q: Thandar ate her lunch. She didn't wash her hands.
a: Thandar ate her lunch without washing her hands.

q: They listened to the lecture but wrote nothing down.
a: They listened to the lecture without writing anything down.

q: Mother posted the letter. She did not put a stamp on it.
a: Mother posted the letter without putting a stamp on it.

q: The students swept the fallen leaves although nobody asked them to.
a: The students swept the fallen leaves without being asked.

q: Nilar cooked the vegetables but she did not wash it.
a: Nilar cooked the vegetables without washing it.

q: That lazy student wants to pass the examination but he does not work hard.
a: That lazy student wants to pass the examination without working hard.

q: I cannot go out as I've not been given permission.
a: I cannot go out without being given permission.

q: When he came into the room, he did not look at anyone.
a: When he came into the room, he came without looking at anyone.

q: The students listened to the talk but they did not understand anything.
a: The students listened to the talk without understanding anything.

q: You can't defeat her if you don't practise your tennis regularly.
a: You can't defeat her without practising your tennis regularly.

q: Mother cooked the curry but she didn't taste it.
a: Mother cooked the curry without tasting it.

q: She resigned from her job. She didn't tell anyone.
a: She resigned from her job without telling anyone.

q: Mother went to the market. She did not take any money with her.
a: Mother went to the market without taking any money with her.

q: U Nyi Nyi came to the wedding. Nobody invited him.
a: U Nyi Nyi came to the wedding without being invited.

q: Mg Mg left the room but he didn't switch off the light.
a: Mg Mg left the room without switching off the light.

q: She wanted to pass the examination, but she didn't work hard.
a: She wanted to pass the examination without working hard.

q: Soe Tun went off on a picnic with his friends. He didn't ask for permission.
a: Soe Tun went off on a picnic with his friends without asking for permission.

q: Ni Ni laid the table for dinner. Nobody asked her.
a: Ni Ni laid the table for dinner without being asked.

q: Yuzana applied for a job. She did not tell anyone at home.
a: Yuzana applied for a job without telling anyone at home.

q: Many students want to pass the examination, but they do not study regularly.
a: Many students want to pass the examination without studying regularly.
